infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Lookout shows nearby potholes and alerts you when one is ahead.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Lookout alerts you about potholes even when the app is in the background while driving.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Lookout needs background location to warn you about potholes while driving.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Lookout shows nearby potholes and alerts you when one is ahead.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Lookout alerts you about potholes even when driving with the app in the background.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Lookout needs background location to warn you about potholes while driving.
